mapper.select: SELECT h.*, u.nickname AS publisher_nickname FROM help_request h LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON h.user_id = u.id WHERE h.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO help_request(user_id, title, description, reward, status) VALUES(#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{reward}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE help_request SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM help_request WHERE status = 0
